docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DAVID LAW'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING MEMBERS MEETING IS CONTINUED TO 8/20/19 PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. RESPONDENT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. EMAIL DATED 7/11/19. THE COURT SUGGESTS FOR RESPONDENT TO GET IN TOUCH WITH THE PETITIONER REGARDING THE COURT DATE. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Members Meeting
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER DAVID LAU'S Petition For Order Compelling Members Meeting is off-calendar per request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Members Meeting
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zhong Ying Kuang 408-442-8080, Respondent in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Respondent appears on behalf of his Father who is the President of the Association, and requests for a different continuance date (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DAVID LAW's Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Members Meeting.

Continued to 8/20/19 per request of the moving party. Respondent has not been served. Email dated 7/11/19. The Court suggests for Respondent to get in touch with the Petitioner regarding the Court date. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
